reviews.review_title: SURVR<---I WISH I CAN GIVE NO STARS
reviews.review_description: I WISH I CAN GIVE NO STARS BUT THATS THE ONLY WAY I CAN SUBMIT MY REVIEW SO ON THAT NOTE ZERO STARS...I need help with this game badly & I can't even get help from YouTube on this game on how to play it and that be my help with games I can't understand I thought this game was a game where u try to survive being in the forest or whatever the name for it but this game looks like all u do is build a house and that don't go to well with the wood blocks u get there's no Animals around how u suppose to survive no water no toilet nothing to eat or kill to eat the only toilet u see when u exit the game what is the purpose of this game I would ask for my refund but I don't even kno what to do on this game I walked far in the forest and see nothing nothing to use but the saw hammer & ETC u can cut trees down for the wood but that's about it can't even make a fire can't have doors WHERE IS THE HELP GUIDE NO BUTTONS TO PRESS TO BRING UP A HELP MENU NO KIND OF ITEMS TO EVEN GET STARTED WHY IS THIS GAME EVEN ON META QUEST IF THE DEVELOPERS ARE NOT INTERESTED IN THEY GAME THEY MADE THIS IS RIDICULOUS AND IT LOOKS LIKE IT CAN BE A GREAT GAME CAUSE U DO INTERACT WITH STUFF IN THIS GAME BUT IM ASKN FOR HELP FROM THE DEVELOPERS FROM META & FROM WHOEVER CAN HELP ME PLEASE & THANK U....ONLY THING U DO IN THIS GAME FROM WHAT I'VE EXPERIENCE IS THE TOOLS U GET THE GARBAGE BAG TO PUT STUFF IN ITS NOT EBEN A BACKPACK ITS A 30 TO UP OR 40 UP SIZE TRASH BAG U CUT DOWN TREES & JUST TRY TO BUILD SOMETHING TO LIVE IN BUT FOR WHAT U CAN JUST LIVE OUTSIDER CAUSE NOTHING IS THERE IN THE GAME WITH NOWAY TO SURVIVE NOT EVEN A CHICKEN PLEASE PLEASE HELP DO YALL EVEN HAVE A DISCORD WHERE FOLKS CAN REACH OUT FOR HELP WHEN NEEDED BUT THIS GOTTA BE VERY BAD GAME IF U CANT GO TO YOUTUBE AND GET A BIT HELP ESPECIALLY WHEN U CANT EVEN REACH THE DEVELOPERS WHO MADE THIS GAME....SO MY QUESTION IS TO META AS WELL WHY IS THIS GAME EVEN IN YALL STORE FOR US TO PURCHASE
